title: Companion — The Ripple
medium: interactive cloth simulation — a US flag on a pole with a toggleable stiffening rod and an atmosphere slider. mass-spring verlet cloth, gravity, procedural wind. vacuum + rod off = the photograph 1969 refused to take. the small droop at the far end is R.'s ripple.
caption: Drag atmosphere to zero, switch the rod off, and the flag hangs straight down along the pole — exactly what nylon does in vacuum. Turn the rod back on; the signal is carried by its prop again. R.'s ripple at the fly is always visible.
